steps.title: Read the intended reference
steps.content: The blank refers to the thirty-eight Kru languages inside the parenthetical. The intended meaning is that those languages can provide information about Proto-Kru because they descend from it. The blank must therefore point back to a plural group of languages, not to one language or to possession by the languages.

steps.title: Reject possessive and singular forms
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C are possessive forms, but the sentence needs a plural subject reference for the descendant relationship, not ownership. Choice D is singular, so it cannot refer to thirty-eight languages. Choice B is the option that supplies the plural reference to those languages. The answer is B.
